summary: Keep scans safe and focused by modeling scope with contexts.
examples: Exclude logout endpoints to keep sessions alive.
Limit scans to /app/ paths during testing.
content:
## Overview
Keep scans safe and focused by modeling scope with contexts.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Defining Scope with Contexts (Workflow 26)
steps: Create a new context for your application.
Define include and exclude regex patterns.
Set the context in scope before scanning.
Use Protected mode to enforce scope rules.
Revisit scope as the app changes.
